title: Process of Returning an Object from a Method in Java
description: A flowchart illustrating the lifecycle of an object from its creation inside a method to its return and subsequent use by the calling code, highlighting that a reference to the object is passed, not the object itself.
relationships: getNewCar creates a new Car object on the Heap
getNewCar returns the memory address (reference) of the object
Caller receives the reference and assigns it to a variable
